nasb.text: and His signs and His works which He did in the midst of Egypt to Pharaoh the king of Egypt and to all his land;

esv.text: his signs and his deeds that he did in Egypt to Pharaoh the king of Egypt and to all his land,

cnv.text: 以及他在埃及向埃及王法老和法老的全國所行的神蹟和作為；

ccb.text: 祂怎样在埃及行神迹奇事对付法老及其国家；
